title: Heroes of Envell REMIX
description: This mod remakes an old mod named «Heroes of Envell»
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/928244474a3c4649930d4dbf36e1098705f1acf4.png)
This mod adds a new dimension to the player's choice of classes, and there are only five of them: Mage, Thief, Warrior, Engineer, and Bart.![class](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31a7820ced4cbb052c56d42859ab42c56a7e531f.png)

There are new blocks and items and modifications of other mods.
![all block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e876a8e7abacf702916b802c342d58a7876d010f.png)

Now, how to get into the dimension, you need to craft a laptop to get into the dimension.

![craft laptop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25b3fd58f0eac667bb256b4b41afdf738fe293c1.png)


## Now how do I summon an assistant?
To call an assistant, you need to write "Backwit" or "backwit" in the chat.

![backwit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53fa998220fb2dc6e2d13ef26733d18415b962b0.png)


## Is it possible to die in a dimension?
No, you will not die, you will be moved to the checkpoint and then survive working only in the dimension from the mod

![checkpoint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c57397f2704e67f4f164904ffc100f60d560b8f.png)

to appear in the checkpoint, just stand on the platform.
